tool_args.label: YTD March 2022 Surplus/(Deficit)

tool_args.label: YTD March 2022 Passenger Revenue Variance
tool_args.raw_text: Passenger revenue through March was below the Adopted budget forecast by $170 million (17%)

evidence_refs.source_quote: Passenger revenue through March was below the Adopted budget forecast by $170 million (17%) in part due to the effects of the COVID-19 Omicron variant impact on subway, bus and commuter rail ridership.

tool_args.label: YTD March 2022 Toll Revenue Variance
tool_args.raw_text: Toll revenue was $22 million (4%) above budget through March

evidence_refs.source_quote: March toll revenue was above budget by $16 million (9%) and was $22 million (4%) above budget through March, reflecting higher traffic volume.

tool_args.label: YTD March 2022 Overtime Variance

tool_args.label: Variable Rate Debt Policy
tool_args.raw_text: The Authority may issue Variable Rate Debt in such amounts as deemed necessary and/or beneficial by staff to provide funding for Approved Capital Programs or to refund existing obligations of the Authority. Upon such issuance, the principal amount of Variable Rate Debt outstanding shall not exceed 25% of the aggregate principal amount of all outstanding obligations of the Authority.

payload.claim_text: The Authority may issue Variable Rate Debt in such amounts as deemed necessary and/or beneficial by staff to provide funding for Approved Capital Programs or to refund existing obligations of the Authority. Upon such issuance, the principal amount of Variable Rate Debt outstanding shall not exceed 25% of the aggregate principal amount of all outstanding obligations of the Authority.

tool_args.label: Real Estate Tax YTD Favorable Variance
tool_args.raw_text: Total real estate transaction taxes YTD April 2022: favorable by $230.0 million (63.4%)
